rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELIZABETH R. RAPOLD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/1/21. (No earlier availability.) Notice does not appear to have been given of these proceedings as required by Probate Code Section 8113. If the cousins are Swiss citizens, notice must be given to the consular official of Switzerland in the U.S. The accounting is for the period ending 8/7/20, but the bank statement is for the period ending 7/15/20. The original bank account must encompass, not precede, the ending date of the accounting period and a reconciliation must be shown for any difference between the accounting and the bank statement. Please file a revised declaration re the original account: LRSF 2.11 M.4 provides that the original(s) must be retained âfor at least the period after the termination, including all appeals, of the case required for conventionally filed documents.â Please cite this language in the declaration. (If the original(s) will be returned to the fiduciary prior to the end of such period, the fiduciary must also sign a declaration stating that she will retain the original(s) for the required period.) There was no disclaimer by the Salvation Army attached to or filed with the petition. The petition did not set forth why $59,557.93 was distributable to the executor; a review of the register of actions disclosed the prior order made on 7/27/20.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SALLY CHRISTINE OWENSBY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order For Preliminary Distribution From Blocked Account In 2020 To Allow Expenses To Offset The Gain On Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the Court to determine if anything can possibly be done with this. The petition filed on 10/30/20 is incomplete (pp. 3-5 are missing). Letters have not been issued yet to the administrator with will annexed; she has no authority to act. In addition, the petition does not appear have been signed and verified by the personal representative; the signature is entirely different from the ones on previously filed papers. Nothing is set forth on the pages that were filed to indicate how the amount of compensation was determined. No declaration by the attorney has been filed to support any fees for extraordinary services. [CRC 7.702.] There is no actual preliminary distribution in the prayer, only requests for fees and costs and for payment of supplemental property tax. As a result of the renewed stay home order due to the COVID-19 emergency, effective 12/6/20, counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review the 8th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.
